mapper.sql: id, label, sort_order AS sortOrder, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM attachment_effect_definitions ORDER BY sort_order ASC, label ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM attachment_effect_definitions ORDER BY sort_order ASC, label ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM attachment_effect_definitions
AND label LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, label ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachment_effect_definitions
AND label LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachment_effect_definitions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachment_effects WHERE definition_id = #{definitionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attachment_effect_definitions ( id, label, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{label}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE label = VALUES(label), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
